summary: Dorothy wakes from her poppy-induced sleep to see the mice gathered. The massive force of mice, combined with the pushing of the Scarecrow and Woodman, pulls the heavy, unconscious Cowardly Lion out of the dangerous poppy field and into the safe, green grass.
production_intent: Execute a high-stakes rescue sequence where a massive force of mice, supported by the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman, drags an unconscious Lion from a poppy field into safe grass. The visual focus must maintain the physical tension of the pulling mechanism and the transition between environments.
scene_short_description: A massive swarm of mice pulls an unconscious lion across a boundary from poppies to grass.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Massive mouse swarm vs heavy unconscious Lion.
scene_start_state: Dorothy waking up amidst poppies, confused by a gathering swarm of mice.
scene_end_state: The Lion resting safely in the green grass, rescue complete.
dominant_action_line: The collective pulling force drags the Lion out of danger.
scene_spatial_layout: Linear movement path from poppy bed to green field
Pulling mechanism (truck/string) acts as the central axis of motion

cowardly_lion: being dragged through the poppies toward the grass
the_scarecrow and tin_woodman: positioned at the rear or sides of the Lion to push

exit_vectors: cowardly_lion exiting the poppy bed into the grass

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH009_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes rescue sequence where a massive force of mice, supported by the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman, drags an unconscious Lion from a poppy field into safe grass. The visual focus must maintain the physical tension of the pulling mechanism and the transition between environments.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- cowardly_lion
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- queen_of_the_field_mice
- Thousands of Field Mice

## Required Environments
- poppy_field_bed (including transition to green field)

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical connection between string, truck, and Lion must remain unbroken.
- Direction of travel must strictly move from poppy field to green grass.

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy wakes up in confusion.
- BT002: The massive rescue effort begins (mice pulling/scarecrow & woodman pushing).
- BT003: The Lion reaches safety in the green grass.
